raw_text:
Welcome to the Northfield University Graduate Application! I see your email is already on file.

Let's get started — first, which program are you interested in?

---actions---
```json
[
  {
    "type": "ask_choice",
    "question": "Which program are you applying to?",
    "options": [
      { "label": "Computer Science (MS)", "value": "cs" },
      { "label": "Data Science (MS)", "value": "data_science" },
      { "label": "Business Administration (MBA)", "value": "mba" },
      { "label": "Education (MEd)", "value": "education" },
      { "label": "Public Health (MPH)", "value": "public_health" },
      { "label": "Mechanical Engineering (MS)", "value": "engineering" }
    ]
  }
]
```

raw_text:
I've assigned your resume and extracted a bunch of information from it. Here's what I filled in:

---actions---
```json
[
  {
    "type": "set_fields",
    "fields": [
      { "field_id": "resume", "value": "Resume.pdf" },
      { "field_id": "full_name", "value": "Jane Doe" },
      { "field_id": "phone", "value": "+1 (123) 456-7890" },
      { "field_id": "country_citizenship", "value": "US" },
      { "field_id": "country_residence", "value": "US" },
      { "field_id": "degrees.0.institution", "value": "University of Anytown" },
      { "field_id": "degrees.0.degree_type", "value": "bachelor" },
      { "field_id": "degrees.0.field_of_study", "value": "Computer Science" },
      { "field_id": "degrees.0.gpa", "value": 3.58 },
      { "field_id": "degrees.0.gpa_scale", "value": "4.0" },
      { "field_id": "degrees.0.end_date", "value": "2025-05" },
      { "field_id": "has_work_experience", "value": true },
      { "field_id": "jobs.0.employer", "value": "TechCorp" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.0.title", "value": "Software Engineering Intern" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.0.start_date", "value": "2024-06" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.0.end_date", "value": "2024-08" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.0.description", "value": "Developed internal tools using Python and Flask to streamline data analysis. Collaborated with frontend developers to implement new UI components using React. Conducted code reviews and participated in agile development cycles." },
      { "field_id": "jobs.1.employer", "value": "University of Anytown" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.1.title", "value": "Teaching Assistant" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.1.start_date", "value": "2023-08" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.1.end_date", "value": "2023-12" },
      { "field_id": "jobs.1.description", "value": "Assisted in CS250: Software Engineering Principles. Held weekly office hours and graded assignments." }
    ]
  },
  {
    "type": "show_preview",
    "title": "Extracted from Resume",
    "sections": [
      {
        "title": "Personal Information",
        "fields": [
          { "label": "Name", "value": "Jane Doe" },
          { "label": "Phone", "value": "+1 (123) 456-7890" },
          { "label": "Citizenship", "value": "US" },
          { "label": "Residence", "value": "US" }
        ]
      },
      {
        "title": "Education",
        "fields": [
          { "label": "Institution", "value": "University of Anytown" },
          { "label": "Degree", "value": "Bachelor's in Computer Science" },
          { "label": "GPA", "value": "3.58 / 4.0" },
          { "label": "Graduated", "value": "May 2025" }
        ]
      },
      {
        "title": "Work Experience",
        "fields": [
          { "label": "Job 1", "value": "Software Engineering Intern @ TechCorp (Summer 2024)" },
          { "label": "Job 2", "value": "Teaching Assistant @ University of Anytown (Fall 2023)" }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

That saved a lot of typing! A few notes:
- I kept your application email as **test@2u.com** (not the one on the resume).
- The work experience dates are approximate based on "Summer 2024" and "Fall 2023" — feel free to adjust those in the form panel.

**Still needed to continue:**
- **Date of birth** and **mailing address**
- **Education start date** and **transcript** (PDF) for your degree
- **Statement of purpose** (document upload)
- **2 recommenders** (contact info)
- **Funding interest**

Want to keep going with your personal details? What's your date of birth and mailing address?

raw_text:
Thanks, glad I could help! You've actually made great progress already. Let me give you a quick estimate of what's left:

**What's done:** Program selection, resume upload, plus a lot of auto-filled personal info, education, and work experience.

**What's still needed:**

| Section | What's missing | Est. time |
|---|---|---|
| **Personal** | Date of birth, mailing address | ~1 min |
| **Education** | Start date, transcript upload (PDF) | ~2 min |
| **Test Scores** | Since you're US-based applying for Data Science — no GRE or TOEFL needed! | **0 min** |
| **Documents** | Statement of purpose (500-1000 words) | ~5 min to upload (longer if you need to write it) |
| **References** | 2-4 recommender contacts (name, email, relationship) | ~5 min |
| **Additional** | Funding interest + optional questions | ~1 min |

**Estimated total: ~15 minutes** if you have your statement of purpose and recommender info ready. The statement of purpose will likely be the biggest item if you haven't written it yet.

Want me to save your progress as a draft so you can pick up where you left off?

---actions---
```json
[
  {
    "type": "show_button",
    "button": "save_draft"
  }
]
```

form_state_snapshot.jobs-0-description: Developed internal tools using Python and Flask to streamline data analysis. Collaborated with frontend developers to implement new UI components using React. Conducted code reviews and participated in agile development cycles.

raw_text:
Your draft has been saved! You can close this and come back anytime — all your progress will be here waiting for you.

When you're ready to finish up, here's a quick checklist of what to have handy:

- **Date of birth** and **mailing address**
- **Education start date** and **official transcript** (PDF)
- **Statement of purpose** (500-1000 words, PDF or DOCX)
- **2 recommender contacts** (name, email, and their affiliation)
- Whether you're interested in **funding/assistantships**

Good luck with the prep, Jane — you've got a strong application shaping up!
